title: Font color in board and item card views
excerpt: Why is it that in the board view when you click into a text box and the font color for the most used answers is white but when you go into the item view and click into a text box the most used answers come up black? It i…

posts.author: rbeckwith (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Why is it that in the board view when you click into a text box and the font color for the most used answers is white but when you go into the item view and click into a text box the most used answers come up black? It is very difficult to see. Is there something I can change without changing my theme to light mode?
